records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Utilized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Utilizing (?).]

defs: To make useful; to turn to profitable account or use; to make use of; as, to utilize the whole power of a machine; to utilize one's opportunities.
quotes: In former ages, the mile-long corridors, with their numerous alcoves, might have been utilized as . . . dungeons.
